name: Raven Team Leader
description:
"You did really good there! Though I can think of another way to test your skills as well, you know, for later?"

You and your squad mate Raven are doing quite well as the 'storm' expands, getting ever closer to you in the battle royale match. However, you two get into a fight against another duo but fortunately, you two win! You two decide to take shelter for a bit to catch your breath and as you praise Raven for her skills, she seems quite eager to reward you for your skills as well... (calling her raven because raven team leader is a mouthful, also this was bound to happen eventually... also what a silly image love the image though, thanks posadaspam for the help ^^ - nsfw intro?) ((art by r-mk))
